# Features Hub Enhancement Roadmap

These enhancements turn your documentation from "complete" into "premium."

## 1. Auto-Generated Sidebar Navigation
- Displays every feature
- Highlights current page
- Reduces friction for browsing

## 2. Breadcrumbs

Example:
```
Documentation → Features → Connect Feed
```

## 3. Last Updated Timestamps

Automatically stamp each page with:
```
Updated: Jan 2025
```

## 4. Version Tags

Useful for big releases:
- v1.0
- v1.1
- Beta
- Preview

## 5. Add Screenshots / Visual Examples

Later, once DNA's UI stabilizes.

## 6. "Related Feature Cards"

At the bottom of each page:
- CONNECT Feed
- Profile & Identity
- Messaging
and more.

## 7. Collapsible FAQ Blocks

Cleaner UX.

## 8. Search Across Documentation

If your stack supports it.

## 9. Auto-Generation Script for New Features

You could run:
```bash
pnpm generate feature my-new-feature
```

It would automatically create:
- Registry entry
- Markdown file
- Template skeleton

This would make your system future-proof.

---

## Priority Levels

### High Priority (Next Sprint)
- Breadcrumbs
- Last Updated Timestamps
- Related Feature Cards

### Medium Priority (Next Quarter)
- Auto-Generated Sidebar Navigation
- Collapsible FAQ Blocks
- Version Tags

### Low Priority (Future)
- Screenshots / Visual Examples
- Full Documentation Search
- Auto-Generation Script
